title: Muscle Building - Fat Loss Program
description: An aggressive fat loss program with emphasis on cardiovascular health and maintaining muscle. Designed for maximum fat reduction.
overview: This aggressive fat loss program combines high-intensity training, high protein intake, and increased cardiovascular work to accelerate fat loss while minimizing muscle loss. Expected fat loss: 0.75-1.5 kg per week depending on starting point.
goals: Minimize muscle loss through high protein and strength training

weekly_schedule.exercises: Bench Press (4x3), Weighted Pull-ups (4x4), Rows (4x4), then 15min HIIT (30sec hard/30sec easy)
Running, cycling, rowing, or swimming at moderate intensity
Squats (4x4), Deadlifts (3x5), Bulgarian Split Squats (3x6), then 15min core work
Circuit: Burpees, Mountain Climbers, Jump Squats, Push-ups (30sec each with 30sec rest, 4 rounds)
Low-moderate intensity cardio: jogging, cycling, or hiking

nutrition.content: 4 egg whites + 1 whole egg + ½ cup oatmeal (dry) + berries
220g grilled chicken breast + 120g white rice + 250g broccoli + minimal oil
45g whey protein + 30g dextrose or white rice
220g white fish or lean turkey + 120g sweet potato + 250g green beans
150g non-fat Greek yogurt (if under calorie target)

macros.protein: 240-280g (2.5-3.0g per lb - CRITICAL for muscle retention)

tips: HIGHEST PRIORITY: Eat your protein targets every single day
Maintain strength in workouts - drop volume but keep weight heavy
Drink 3-4 liters of water daily to manage hunger
Sleep 8+ hours for recovery and hormone optimization
Take electrolytes during fasted cardio sessions
Consider supplements: multivitamin, omega-3, and BCAAs
Track weight daily and look for weekly trends (not daily fluctuations)
If experiencing extreme fatigue, add 100-150 carb calories
Refeed day (higher carbs): 1x per week for mental break and hormone recovery
This is an aggressive approach - consider dropping to moderate deficit after 8 weeks
Listen to your body - if constantly fatigued or injured, adjust deficit
Plan your environment - remove tempting foods from home
